title: CleanTransformerDataset
description: Clean transformer dataset produced by joining SCADA telemetry with GIS asset data. Maps to the Transformer ontology object.

transformer_id.description: Primary key - joined from GIS asset transformer_id and SCADA telemetry transformer_id

oil_temp.description: Oil temperature in degrees Celsius, sourced from SCADA telemetry (oil_temp_c)

load_current.description: Load current in amps, sourced from SCADA telemetry (load_amps)

age_years.description: Transformer age in years, sourced from GIS asset data

last_inspection_date.description: Last inspection date in ISO 8601 format, sourced from GIS asset data

risk_score.description: Computed risk score (0-100), set by Risk_Scoring logic. Null until first computation.

alert_status.description: Alert status set by Smart_Alerting logic. Null until first evaluation.
